    G

    generateInvitationCode() - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Generates an invitation code

    Gets all questions by a specific user.

    Retrieves a list of all Review objects, optionally filtered by username.

    Gets a list of all users in the database.

    Gets answeredBy.

    Gets the answer id.

    Returns the identifier of the answer to which this review belongs.

    Gets a List of Answers.

    Gets askedBy.

    Gets the date and time the answer was created at.

    Gets createdAt

    Gets the date and time the question was created at.
